message:
feat(security): add public ACIP pattern detection helpers

Add public convenience functions for quick pattern detection without
instantiating the full ACIP engine:

- contains_injection_patterns(content: &str) -> bool
  Checks if content matches any of the disallowed prompt injection
  patterns (e.g., "ignore previous instructions", "system prompt:")

- contains_sensitive_data(content: &str) -> bool
  Checks if content matches sensitive data patterns (API keys,
  tokens, private keys, passwords)

These are thin wrappers around the DISALLOWED_PATTERNS and
SENSITIVE_PATTERNS regex sets used internally by the ACIP engine.

Use cases:
- Quick taint checking in pattern extraction (mining module)
- Pre-filtering content before full ACIP analysis
- Lightweight security checks in hot paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
